problem_statement.description: A concise description of the specific pain point or gap in the market identified from the competitive analysis and user voice data.

target_user_segment.description: A specific description of the persona most likely to adopt this MVP, including behavioral traits and current tool usage.

scope_in.description: Explicit list of features or capabilities that must be present in the MVP to address the primary unmet need.

scope_out.description: Features or technical requirements explicitly excluded from the MVP to maintain the 10h/week constraint and speed to market.

validation_rules.grounding_requirement: All features in scope_in must map directly to an unmet need cited in user_voice.json with a frequency count > 10.
validation_rules.resource_check: Total scope must be achievable within the 1-week build plan provided in the output.
